entry.title: Fixed: I-90 Form (Section 4 Disability Question)
entry.summary: We fixed an issue in the Green Card Replacement (Form I-90) where the disability question in Section 4 could still prompt users for additional information even when “No” was selected for having a disability. This behavior caused confusion because the follow-up field should only appear…
entry.content:
We fixed an issue in the Green Card Replacement (Form I-90) where the disability question in Section 4 could still prompt users for additional information even when “No” was selected for having a disability. This behavior caused confusion because the follow-up field should only appear when the user selects “Yes.”

The issue was reported by a user on March 8, and the form logic has now been corrected so that the follow-up question only appears when appropriate. Thank you to the users who report issues—these reports help us improve the reliability of Fillvisa forms.

entry.title: Upgrade page
entry.summary: I added a dedicated Upgrade Page in Fillvisa Plus to handle cases where a user’s trial period has ended. When a trial expires, certain application actions are restricted and the user is automatically redirected to the upgrade page, where they can review subscription options and…
entry.content:
I added a dedicated Upgrade Page in Fillvisa Plus to handle cases where a user’s trial period has ended. When a trial expires, certain application actions are restricted and the user is automatically redirected to the upgrade page, where they can review subscription options and continue using the platform.

 

 

This update helps ensure a smoother transition from trial to paid usage while clearly communicating the account status. Instead of encountering unexpected restrictions, users are guided to a single page that explains the limitation and provides a straightforward way to upgrade their plan.

entry.title: Dynamic Dashboard
entry.summary: We introduced a new Dynamic Dashboard in Fillvisa Plus to give legal professionals and their clients a clearer overview of their work. The dashboard surfaces key information such as recent cases, forms in progress, and quick actions, allowing users to navigate their active workload without…
entry.content:
We introduced a new Dynamic Dashboard in Fillvisa Plus to give legal professionals and their clients a clearer overview of their work. The dashboard surfaces key information such as recent cases, forms in progress, and quick actions, allowing users to navigate their active workload without having to manually browse through different sections of the application.

 

 

 

The dashboard updates automatically as cases and forms change, helping users quickly see what requires attention. This release focuses on improving day-to-day workflow by making important information easier to access immediately after login, reducing the need to search through multiple pages to find active work.

entry.title: Created Changelog
entry.summary: I created official Fillvisa Changelog, a public record of updates, fixes, and improvements across both Fillvisa Free and Fillvisa Plus. This website documents new features, behavior changes, bug fixes, and any features that are deprecated or removed. The goal is to maintain transparency with users…
entry.content:
I created official Fillvisa Changelog, a public record of updates, fixes, and improvements across both Fillvisa Free and Fillvisa Plus.

This website documents new features, behavior changes, bug fixes, and any features that are deprecated or removed. The goal is to maintain transparency with users while keeping a clear history of how the product evolves over time.

 

 

The changelog also closes the loop on user feedback. When users report bugs or issues in Fillvisa forms, confirmed fixes will be noted here so everyone can see what has been addressed. This helps us stay accountable and ensures that improvements are visible to the community using Fillvisa.
